nodes.context: Criminal organization based in Seattle, Washington, involved in racketeering, prostitution, and strip-club operations.
New York-based Mafia family involved in an internal war referred to as the 'Banana Wars'.

edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, Colacurcio met with Bonanno crime family member Salvatore "Bill" Bonanno in Yakima, Washington to discuss a business relationship.
edges.context: Colacurcio met with a Bonanno family member to discuss a business relationship.
